headline: Why Robinhood (HOOD) Shares Are Plunging Today
summary: Shares of financial services company Robinhood (NASDAQ:HOOD) fell 5.3% in the afternoon session after analysts lowered their price targets amid worries about the company's unstable revenue base, which stems from its clients' high-risk trading habits.

headline: Is Robinhood Markets (HOOD) Pricing In Too Much Optimism After Strong Multi Year Gains
summary: Wondering whether Robinhood Markets at around US$70.89 is priced for the future or already reflecting a lot of optimism? This article walks you through what the current share price could mean for you. The stock has seen a 3.4% decline over the past week and a 5.7% decline over the last 30 days, while still showing a 59.8% return over the past year and a very large return over three years, around 7x. Year to date, the share price is down 38.5%, which can change how the market views its risk...
